response:
Sec. 1  
People who are allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their immune system reacts to peanut proteins in the same way it would react to any other allergen  
Living underwater does not eliminate exposure to peanut proteins which may be present in food or other sources  
The allergic reaction is triggered by the presence of the allergen not by the environment in which the person lives  

Sec. 2  
Underwater living does not provide a solution to the problem of allergen exposure  
The body's immune response is not affected by the presence of water  
Therefore people with peanut allergies must avoid allergens regardless of their living environment
